item.title: Ajay Kakkar — Qlik Solutions Architect & AI Product Builder
item.description: Senior Qlik Solutions Architect and AI Product Builder with 11+ years experience. Led R&D on 8 enterprise products at Wowizer.ai. Qlik Cloud & Enterprise API expert. Available for senior roles in Mumbai and remote.

item.title: Qlik Sense Upgrade Guide — Ajay Kakkar
item.description: Interactive Qlik Sense version upgrade tool. Prerequisites checklist, safe upgrade paths, PostgreSQL migration guide. Built by Ajay Kakkar, Qlik Solutions Architect.

item.title: Qlik Sense Release Notes — Ajay Kakkar
item.description: Complete Qlik Sense Enterprise release notes index — all 33 versions from 3.0 (2016) to Nov-23, with EOS dates and direct PDF/HTML links. By Ajay Kakkar.

item.title: Qlik Sense PostgreSQL Version Matrix — Ajay Kakkar
item.description: PostgreSQL version compatibility matrix for every Qlik Sense Enterprise release. Know which PG version your QS version ships with. By Ajay Kakkar.

item.title: Ajay Kakkar — Qlik Solutions Architect & AI Product Builder
item.description: Senior Qlik Solutions Architect and AI Product Builder with 11+ years experience. Led R&D on 8 enterprise products at Wowizer.ai. Qlik Cloud & Enterprise API expert. Available for senior roles in Mumbai and remote.
